title: Finding a Novel's Voice
description: First draft voice work: point of view, tense, distance, music.
summary_pt_br: Voz do romance: 1ª/3ª pessoa, presente/passado, próximo/distante, musical/plano. Teste em 500 palavras.

scenes.subtitle_en: First draft voice work: point of view, tense, distance, music.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Voz do romance: 1ª/3ª pessoa, presente/passado, próximo/distante, musical/plano. Teste em 500 palavras.

scenes.text_en: First draft voice work: point of view, tense, distance, music. Focus: finding a novel's voice. First person in present tense feels like a confession.
scenes.text_pt: Voz do romance: 1ª/3ª pessoa, presente/passado, próximo/distante, musical/plano. Teste em 500 palavras. Foco: finding a novel's voice. Primeira pessoa no presente parece confissão.

scenes.title: Finding a Novel's Voice
scenes.body_en: Voice decisions: FIRST vs THIRD person. PRESENT vs PAST tense. CLOSE vs DISTANT narrator. MUSICAL vs FLAT prose. Test each pairing in 500 words before committing.
scenes.body_pt: Voz do romance: 1ª/3ª pessoa, presente/passado, próximo/distante, musical/plano. Teste em 500 palavras.

examples.en: First person in present tense feels like a confession.
examples.pt: Primeira pessoa no presente parece confissão.

examples.en: Third-person close distance reads like intimate biography.
Musical prose demands sentences that breathe.
examples.pt: Prosa musical pede frases que respiram.

scenes.title: Key vocabulary — Finding a Novel's Voice

exercise.question: Complete: "First person in present tense feels like a ___."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "First person in present tense feels like a confession."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Primeira pessoa no presente parece confissão.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
Third-person close distance reads like intimate biography.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "Third-person close distance reads like intimate biography."
Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Finding a Novel's Voice — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre finding a novel's voice. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Lúcia, you've drafted 500 words in first person present.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Read aloud until the rhythm holds.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Voice is the novel you must not lose.

scenes.title: The first draft
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Describe four voice decisions. Use at least three narrative terms.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: At her kitchen table, Dona Lúcia reread the first 500 words of a novel she had drafted four different ways.

paragraphs.speaker: Lúcia
paragraphs.en: First person in present tense feels like a confession — urgent, trapped in the protagonist's head completely.

paragraphs.speaker: Writer friend
paragraphs.en: Third-person close distance reads more patient — almost like an intimate biography of a fictional friend.

paragraphs.speaker: Lúcia
paragraphs.en: I'll commit to first person past for the first half, then shift to third close for the retrospective coda.

paragraphs.speaker: Writer friend
paragraphs.en: Reading aloud until the rhythm holds — that test catches voice problems your eyes alone will always miss.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Voice, Lúcia believed, is the novel you must not lose — every other mistake can be fixed on revision.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Finding a Novel's Voice". First draft voice work: point of view, tense, distance, music. First person in present tense feels like a confession. Third-person close distance reads like intimate biography. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Finding a Novel's Voice". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
check.explanation: She says the title: "Finding a Novel's Voice".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Finding a Novel's Voice".

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
